title: jasminum pentaneurum
intro: Jasminum polyanthum, also known as the many-flowered jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum polyanthum include reducing stress, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
